name: Diapers
description: Client lives in a 4-room HDB flat with her elderly parents, husband and their four young children, aged 11, 6, 5, and 1. The family is currently facing financial challenges due to bankruptcy and the monthly household income is insufficient to meet the family's basic needs. Family is seeking support for essential items such as Drypers Superdry Pants XL and Drypers Superdry Pants XXL for their young children. For further liaison, kindly WhatsApp me at 98598768, I will respond from 9am to 5pm on weekdays. Thank you very much!

passiton.name: Tena Adult Diapers
passiton.description: 8 packets of XL and 2 packets of L sized Tena brand adult diapers, all are unopened. For Sembawang/Yishun/Woodlands area only. Preferably for both sizes to be taken together

name: Adult diapers
description:
Senior has dementia and has incontinence issues, coupled with recent bleeding of her uterus. She requires long-term adult diapers assistance. The family/caregivers are overwhelmed with her care conditions and the family is bearing debts as well. The assistance can greatly help unload the cost of the family. 
Due to better absorption, the family is more used to Tena L size for her, and would use up to 8 to 10 pieces a day.
